sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112796" key="fw/ganon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φώγᾰνον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n112796.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φρύγετρον</ref> </xr> in the <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Κοινή,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:109" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.109</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
